Best and Reliable Singapore Catering Service 

We are one of the best catering companies in Singapore, providing various catering services for corporate events, personal private parties and home delivery food. Choose from our wide variety of menus featuring Buffet, Mini Buffet, Tingkat, Lunch Box, Bento Boxes and High Tea. Regardless of your catering needs, you can be assured that the catering part for your next event will be done by us to perfection.

 

Singapore Food Caterer With A Decade Of Experience

We know everyone will have their own preference for food. Eating green and more healthier is now becoming popular and a trend among the new generation. Hence, vegetarian options are also available for some of our dishes so there is something to cater for your guests with their own preference.

 

Signature Dish Of Our Catering Menu

Have our signature Curry Chicken however you wait it, be it our home delivery food service for lunch or dinner, Buffet to accompany your Yang Chow Fried Rice , Mini Buffet to enjoy it at the comfort of your home, High Tea to accompany your freshly steamed dim sum or packed in a delicious Bento or Lunch Box.

 

Why Choose Us As Your Caterer In Singapore

There are a lot of choices for food catering in Singapore, and House of Catering F&B promises to provide the catering service in Singapore at affordable prices while promising delicious food as well. To ensure the quality of our food, our chefs are all professional and following our unique recipe to cook every cuisine. You can be assured we are the best catering service you can find in Singapore in terms of quality and quantity.

 

Healthy Catering In Singapore

What’s more, we ensure our clients that are dining with a Healthier Food Catering in SG, with our promise of 100% no MSG, no preservatives, less oil and salt and it makes us become one of the leading SG catering companies. You can definitely look forward to have the food done by us, to have a sumptuous spread or comforting home cooked food with proving you with the nutrients you need.

 

Popular For Event Catering

Food is one of the factors that makes your event even more successful, especially for a corporate event. Our corporate catering service is the most popular service among our clients. And most of them definitely come back for our catering service when they are going to have their corporate event again.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
